notes: The contract minted the full fixed supply to the deployer wallet at deployment.
The owner-held reserve has been transferred to a separate publicly disclosed wallet.
Circulating supply reporting can vary by data provider; a normal owner-controlled reserve wallet is not the same as a multisig, lock, or vesting contract.

allocations.name: Public circulation, ecosystem, and liquidity allocation
allocations.notes: Includes liquidity, community, ecosystem, and future public distribution. Not all of this allocation is immediately circulating until on-chain transfers, liquidity, or distribution events occur.

allocations.name: Owner-held reserve
allocations.notes: Reserved for the owner/founder in a separate owner-controlled wallet. It should be publicly disclosed and should not be described as circulating while held as a reserve. This wallet is not a lock, vesting contract, or multisig.

recommendedNextStep: For stronger reserve credibility, move the 600,000,000 GCA reserve from the normal owner-controlled wallet to a Safe multisig or lock/vesting contract and publish that address.
